prompt:
Create a Makefile for this C project. The project has source files in src/ and headers in include/. Requirements:

1. Variables: CC=gcc, CFLAGS=-Wall -Wextra -I include, SRC=$(wildcard src/*.c), OBJ=$(SRC:.c=.o), TARGET=myapp

2. Targets:
   - 'all' (default): build the TARGET executable from object files
   - Individual .o rules: compile .c to .o with proper dependencies
   - 'clean': remove all .o files and the TARGET executable
   - 'test': run the built executable and check exit code
   - 'install': copy TARGET to /usr/local/bin (use install command)

3. Use automatic variables ($@, $<, $^) where appropriate
4. Include proper .PHONY declarations

conversation.content: I'll create a Makefile for your C project with the specified requirements. Let me first check what files we have in the src/ and include/ directories to understand the project structure better.

{
  "filePath": "/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-76eotgf0/Makefile",
  "content": "CC = gcc
CFLAGS = -Wall -Wextra -I include
SRC = $(wildcard src/*.c)
OBJ = $(SRC:.c=.o)
TARGET = myapp

.PHONY: all clean test install

all: $(TARGET)

$(TARGET): $(OBJ)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $@ $^

%.o: %.c
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c -o $@ $<

clean:
	rm -f $(OBJ) $(TARGET)

test: $(TARGET)
	./$(TARGET)
	@echo "Exit code: $$?"

install: $(TARGET)
	install -m 755 $(TARGET) /usr/local/bin/"
}
Now I'll create the Makefile with all the specified requirements:

Created Makefile with all specified requirements:
- Variables: CC=gcc, CFLAGS=-Wall -Wextra -I include, SRC=$(wildcard src/*.c), OBJ=$(SRC:.c=.o), TARGET=myapp
- Targets: all (default), clean, test, install
- Used automatic variables ($@, $<, $^)
- Included proper .PHONY declarations for all targets
- Created proper compilation rules with dependencies

files.content:
CC = gcc
CFLAGS = -Wall -Wextra -I include
SRC = $(wildcard src/*.c)
OBJ = $(SRC:.c=.o)
TARGET = myapp

.PHONY: all clean test install

all: $(TARGET)

$(TARGET): $(OBJ)
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $@ $^

%.o: %.c
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c -o $@ $<

clean:
	rm -f $(OBJ) $(TARGET)

test: $(TARGET)
	./$(TARGET)
	@echo "Exit code: $$?"

install: $(TARGET)
	install -m 755 $(TARGET) /usr/local/bin/
